title: Improved Workstations
description: This Mod will add improved variants of vanilla workstations as well as brand new workstations to fill all of your needs
body:
This mod intends to overhaul workstations in Minecraft.
Current features include furnace variants for recipes with no efficient smelter (clay, stone, charcoal, etc.)
Future planned features include Multiblock Workstations like mega furnaces.

- The Kiln
  - Cooks clay, cobblestone, cobbled deepslate, bricks, terracotta, etc. at double speed.
- The Glassblower
  - Cooks sand into glass at double speed.
- The Coking Oven
  - Cooks logs into charcoal at 2x speed.
  - Cooks sand into Quartz.
